title: Manufacturing, Assembling, and the Testing Processes

paragraphs.source: OE fabrication: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **OE fabrication**: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: OE fabrication: As discussed above, TSMC will play a crucial role in fabricating the PICs, EICs and integrating them and of the CPO system. Their COUPE platform appears to be the solution of choice for next generation CPO endpoints. Global Foundries, and Tower are the foundries who have strong SiPho capabilities, but their lack of leading edge CMOS and advanced packaging constrain their ability to provide the higher bandwidth OEs of the future.

pro.text: 光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）制造: 如前所述，台积电将在PIC、EIC的制造以及CPO系统的集成过程中发挥关键作用。其COUPE平台似乎已成为下一代CPO端点的优先解决方案。Global Foundries和Tower虽然拥有较强的SiPho工艺能力，但由于缺乏领先的CMOS工艺和先进封装技术，限制了它们提供未来更高带宽OE器件的能力。
pro.tokenized_text: [[[STRONG_1|光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）制造]]]: 如前所述，台积电将在PIC、EIC的制造以及CPO系统的集成过程中发挥关键作用。其COUPE平台似乎已成为下一代CPO端点的优先解决方案。Global Foundries和Tower虽然拥有较强的SiPho工艺能力，但由于缺乏领先的CMOS工艺和先进封装技术，限制了它们提供未来更高带宽OE器件的能力。

paragraphs.source: Advanced packaging: Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) providers will focus on the back-end processes: including OE packaging, OE testing, and system packaging (laser and coupler integration & testing).
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **Advanced packaging**: Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) providers will focus on the back-end processes: including OE packaging, OE testing, and system packaging (laser and coupler integration & testing).
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Advanced packaging: Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) providers will focus on the back-end processes: including OE packaging, OE testing, and system packaging (laser and coupler integration & testing).

pro.text: 先进封装：外包半导体组装与测试（OSAT）供应商将专注于后段制程，包括OE封装、OE测试以及系统级封装（激光器与耦合器集成及测试）。

paragraphs.source: ASE/SPIL (3711.TW), Amkor ($AMKR), and Shunsin (6451.TW) are primary providers of such solutions. Among them, ASE stands out as a key supplier in Nvidia’s supply chain, including involvement in the future Rubin-rack CPO systems, while Shunsin maintains close ties with Broadcom.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ASE/SPIL (3711.TW), Amkor ($AMKR), and Shunsin (6451.TW) are primary providers of such solutions. Among them, ASE stands out as a key supplier in Nvidia’s supply chain, including involvement in the future Rubin-rack CPO systems, while Shunsin maintains close ties with Broadcom.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: ASE/SPIL (3711.TW), Amkor ($AMKR), and Shunsin (6451.TW) are primary providers of such solutions. Among them, ASE stands out as a key supplier in Nvidia’s supply chain, including involvement in the future Rubin-rack CPO systems, while Shunsin maintains close ties with Broadcom.

pro.text: ASE/SPIL（3711.TW）、Amkor（$AMKR）和Shunsin（6451.TW）是这类解决方案的主要供应商。其中，ASE作为英伟达供应链中的重要供应商脱颖而出，未来将参与鲁宾机柜（Rubin-rack）CPO系统的生产，而Shunsin则与博通保持着紧密合作关系。

paragraphs.source: Other notable names are Fabrinet ($FN), TFC Optical (300394.SH), and Foxconn (2354.TW). Fabrinet has long served as the module assembler for Nvidia’s in-house optical module units and is now actively building capabilities in OE packaging, testing, and full system assembly. Fabrinet is also viewed as one of the potential candidates for Broadcom’s CPO system assembly work, alongside Micas and Foxconn.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Other notable names are Fabrinet ($FN), TFC Optical (300394.SH), and Foxconn (2354.TW). Fabrinet has long served as the module assembler for Nvidia’s in-house optical module units and is now actively building capabilities in OE packaging, testing, and full system assembly. Fabrinet is also viewed as one of the potential candidates for Broadcom’s CPO system assembly work, alongside Micas and Foxconn.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Other notable names are Fabrinet ($FN), TFC Optical (300394.SH), and Foxconn (2354.TW). Fabrinet has long served as the module assembler for Nvidia’s in-house optical module units and is now actively building capabilities in OE packaging, testing, and full system assembly. Fabrinet is also viewed as one of the potential candidates for Broadcom’s CPO system assembly work, alongside Micas and Foxconn.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**
其他值得关注的企业包括 Fabrinet（$FN）、TFC Optical（300394.SH）和鸿海（2354.TW）。Fabrinet长期担任英伟达自有光模块的组装厂商，目前正积极扩展OE封装、测试及完整系统组装能力。Fabrinet也被视为博通CPO系统组装工作的潜在候选者之一，与Micas和鸿海并列。

paragraphs.source: TFC has been working closely with Nvidia on CPO design for the past 3-4 years and will be a main supplier for FAUs. The company has been investing in advanced packaging facilities in Suzhou, China, signaling its ambition to secure a larger role in the CPO supply chain.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: TFC has been working closely with Nvidia on CPO design for the past 3-4 years and will be a main supplier for FAUs. The company has been investing in advanced packaging facilities in Suzhou, China, signaling its ambition to secure a larger role in the CPO supply chain.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: TFC has been working closely with Nvidia on CPO design for the past 3-4 years and will be a main supplier for FAUs. The company has been investing in advanced packaging facilities in Suzhou, China, signaling its ambition to secure a larger role in the CPO supply chain.

pro.text: TFC光电在过去3-4年间一直与英伟达在CPO设计上密切合作，并将成为FAU的主要供应商。该公司已在苏州投资建设先进的封装设施，显示出其希望在CPO供应链中占据更大份额的雄心。

paragraphs.source: Electro-optical (E/O) testing equipment: During the testing process, the service vendors mentioned above use electro-optical (E/O) testing tools to ensure system reliability. However, the industry is still developing and has yet to fully converge on a standardized testing methodology for photonic engines. Each vendor is developing various solutions to gain a foothold in this emerging space.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: **Electro-optical (E/O) testing equipment**: During the testing process, the service vendors mentioned above use electro-optical (E/O) testing tools to ensure system reliability. However, the industry is still developing and has yet to fully converge on a standardized testing methodology for photonic engines. Each vendor is developing various solutions to gain a foothold in this emerging space.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Electro-optical (E/O) testing equipment: During the testing process, the service vendors mentioned above use electro-optical (E/O) testing tools to ensure system reliability. However, the industry is still developing and has yet to fully converge on a standardized testing methodology for photonic engines. Each vendor is developing various solutions to gain a foothold in this emerging space.

pro.text: 电光（E/O）测试设备：在测试环节，上述服务供应商会使用电光（E/O）测试工具来确保系统可靠性。然而，该行业仍在发展中，尚未就光子引擎的标准化测试方法达成共识。各厂商都在开发不同解决方案，以期在这个新兴领域站稳脚跟。

paragraphs.source: Other key equipment providers in the CPO supply chain include Keysight, Ficontec, Teradyne, Advantest, FormFactor, Chroma, Anritsu, and Multilane. Among them, Keysight is a large player in the field - they are known for providing high-speed testing equipment with premium quality (and premium price!). For example, they recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing. Due to their position in the market, they can well benefit from the CPO trend.

inline_elements.text: recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Other key equipment providers in the CPO supply chain include Keysight, Ficontec, Teradyne, Advantest, FormFactor, Chroma, Anritsu, and Multilane. Among them, Keysight is a large player in the field - they are known for providing high-speed testing equipment with premium quality (and premium price!). For example, they [recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing](https://www.keysight.com/us/en/about/newsroom/news-releases/2025/0325-pr25-056-keysights-new-sampling-oscilloscopes-revolutionize-1-6t-transceiver-optical-testing-for-ai-data-centers.html). Due to their position in the market, they can well benefit from the CPO trend.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Other key equipment providers in the CPO supply chain include Keysight, Ficontec, Teradyne, Advantest, FormFactor, Chroma, Anritsu, and Multilane. Among them, Keysight is a large player in the field - they are known for providing high-speed testing equipment with premium quality (and premium price!). For example, they recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing. Due to their position in the market, they can well benefit from the CPO trend.

parent_inline_elements.text: recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing

pro.text: CPO供应链中的其他关键设备供应商包括是德科技（Keysight）、FiconTEC、泰瑞达（Teradyne）、爱德万（Advantest）、FormFactor、致茂（Chroma）、安立（Anritsu）和Multilane。其中，是德科技是该领域的重要参与者，以提供高质量（当然价格也不菲）的高速测试设备而闻名。例如，他们recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing 。由于其市场地位，是德科技有望从CPO趋势中充分受益。
pro.tokenized_text: CPO供应链中的其他关键设备供应商包括是德科技（Keysight）、FiconTEC、泰瑞达（Teradyne）、爱德万（Advantest）、FormFactor、致茂（Chroma）、安立（Anritsu）和Multilane。其中，是德科技是该领域的重要参与者，以提供高质量（当然价格也不菲）的高速测试设备而闻名。例如，他们[[[LINK_1|recently announced two new oscilloscopes for 1.6T optical transceiver testing]]] 。由于其市场地位，是德科技有望从CPO趋势中充分受益。

paragraphs.source: Ficontec has a strong foundation in photonics testing and is now also actively expanding its electrical testing capabilities. One of its key strengths is wafer-level photonic testing – which improves the efficiency of the traditionally inefficient photonic testing process. For example, the company recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs, compatible with existing semi ATE architecture. The machine is claimed as the industry’s first double-sided wafer testing machine. In addition to testing equipment, Ficontec also provides FAU assembly and coupling machines, which we’ll explore in more detail in the next section.

inline_elements.text: recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Ficontec has a strong foundation in photonics testing and is now also actively expanding its electrical testing capabilities. One of its key strengths is wafer-level photonic testing – which improves the efficiency of the traditionally inefficient photonic testing process. For example, the company [recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs](https://www.ficontec.com/ficontec-releases-innovative-wafer-level-test-cell-to-complement-existing-ate/), compatible with existing semi ATE architecture. The machine is claimed as the industry’s first double-sided wafer testing machine. In addition to testing equipment, Ficontec also provides FAU assembly and coupling machines, which we’ll explore in more detail in the next section.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Ficontec has a strong foundation in photonics testing and is now also actively expanding its electrical testing capabilities. One of its key strengths is wafer-level photonic testing – which improves the efficiency of the traditionally inefficient photonic testing process. For example, the company recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs, compatible with existing semi ATE architecture. The machine is claimed as the industry’s first double-sided wafer testing machine. In addition to testing equipment, Ficontec also provides FAU assembly and coupling machines, which we’ll explore in more detail in the next section.

parent_inline_elements.text: recently introduced a new high-throughput wafer-level testing tool for PICs

pro.text: FiconTEC在光子测试领域拥有坚实基础，目前也在积极扩展其电气测试能力。其核心优势之一是晶圆级光子测试，能够显著提升传统上效率低下的光子测试流程。例如，该公司最近推出了一款适用于PIC的高吞吐量晶圆级测试设备，与现有的半导体ATE架构兼容。这台设备据称是业界首款双面晶圆测试机。除测试设备外，FiconTEC还提供FAU组装和耦合设备，我们将在下一节中更详细探讨。

paragraphs.source: Teradyne is also a large player in the field, with a strong historical presence in electrical testing, but the company has been “very serious” about getting into photonic testing. For example, the company has also recently acquired a startup specializing in packaged optical testing, a move that reflects its strategic push to build out capabilities for CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Teradyne is also a large player in the field, with a strong historical presence in electrical testing, but the company has been “very serious” about getting into photonic testing. For example, the company has also recently acquired a startup specializing in packaged optical testing, a move that reflects its strategic push to build out capabilities for CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Teradyne is also a large player in the field, with a strong historical presence in electrical testing, but the company has been “very serious” about getting into photonic testing. For example, the company has also recently acquired a startup specializing in packaged optical testing, a move that reflects its strategic push to build out capabilities for CPO.

pro.text: 泰瑞达（Teradyne）也是该领域的重要参与者，其在电气测试领域拥有深厚的历史积淀，但该公司已“非常认真”地进军光子测试。例如，泰瑞达最近收购了一家专注于封装光学测试的初创公司，此举显示其正积极布局CPO（共封装光学）相关能力。

paragraphs.source: Chroma has been supplying photonic testing equipment for laser diodes used in 3D sensing and optical communications, and it has the potential to leverage this expertise to enter the CPO space. However, the company’s pace of innovation currently lags some of its competitors.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Chroma has been supplying photonic testing equipment for laser diodes used in 3D sensing and optical communications, and it has the potential to leverage this expertise to enter the CPO space. However, the company’s pace of innovation currently lags some of its competitors.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Chroma has been supplying photonic testing equipment for laser diodes used in 3D sensing and optical communications, and it has the potential to leverage this expertise to enter the CPO space. However, the company’s pace of innovation currently lags some of its competitors.

pro.text: 致茂（Chroma）一直为用于3D传感和光通信的激光二极管提供光子测试设备，并有望凭借这一专业经验进入共封装光学（CPO）领域。不过，该公司的创新速度目前仍落后于部分竞争对手。
